reference: I am trying to get pregnant, but I have painful irregular periods. However, they have been coming every month. My first period came on April twelve-nineteen, and my most recent was May twenty-three-twenty-nine. I had unprotected sex on the 24th, 27th, and 31st. I really want a baby; I am twenty-seven years old. Also, my periods are only really painful on the 1st and 3rd days; the other days are tolerable. Please help, I need to know how to better my chances. I am on Solarray's Fertility Blend SP-one and taking prenatal vitamins.
text: I am trying to get pregnant, but I have painful irregular periods. However, they have been coming every month. My first period came on April twelve nineteen, and my most recent was May twenty three twenty nine. I had unprotected sex on the twenty fourth, twenty seventh, and thirty first. I really want a baby. I am twenty seven years old. Also, my periods are only really painful on the first and third days. The other days are tolerable. Please help. I need to know how to better my chances. I am on Solaray's fertility blend SP one and taking prenatal vitamins.
